title: Pottery Without A Kiln - 1 - The Material
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
This uses geopolymers to make various things but most of all a home fire clay that can be fired in a domestic cooker or oven
